sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./PathologyPage.css"; const PathologyPage = () => { const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null); // FULL dataset for all cards (healthCheckups, healthTests, fullBodyCheckups) const healthCheckups = [ { id: "hc-std", title: "STD Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140048.png", oldPrice: 2990, price: 1499, discount: "50% Off", tests: [ "HBsAg (ECLIA)", "VDRL Qualitative", "Hepatitis C Virus antibodies (Anti HCV)", "HIV 1 & 2 (screening)", ], reportTime: "12 hours", description: "Essential sexually-transmitted infections panel.", }, { id: "hc-fever", title: "Fever Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/3075/3075977.png", oldPrice: 1200, price: 699, discount: "42% Off", tests: ["CBC", "CRP", "Malaria (if indicated)", "Urine Routine"], reportTime: "8 hours", description: "Quick fever panel to identify infection markers.", }, { id: "hc-pcod", title: "PCOD Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/3004/3004613.png", oldPrice: 2100, price: 1199, discount: "43% Off", tests: ["Hormone profile (LH/FSH)", "Prolactin", "TSH"], reportTime: "24 hours", description: "Hormone panel commonly used for PCOD screening.", }, { id: "hc-senior", title: "Senior Citizen Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/3048/3048122.png", oldPrice: 5999, price: 2999, discount: "50% Off", tests: ["CBC", "LFT", "KFT", "Lipid Profile", "Blood Sugar", "Thyroid"], reportTime: "24–36 hours", description: "Comprehensive basic package for elderly health monitoring.", }, ]; const healthTests = [ { id: "ht-kft", title: "Kidney Function Test", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/616/616408.png", oldPrice: 999, price: 599, discount: "40% Off", tests: ["Serum Creatinine", "Urea", "Electrolytes"], reportTime: "8 hours", description: "Core kidney markers to evaluate renal function.", }, { id: "ht-vitd", title: "Vitamin D, 25-Hydroxy", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2750/2750686.png", oldPrice: 999, price: 499, discount: "50% Off", tests: ["Vitamin D (25-OH)"], reportTime: "24 hours", description: "Checks vitamin D status — common deficiency screening.", }, { id: "ht-hba1c", title: "HbA1c", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2170/2170153.png", oldPrice: 699, price: 399, discount: "43% Off", tests: ["HbA1c"], reportTime: "6 hours", description: "Long-term blood glucose control marker.", }, { id: "ht-lipid", title: "Lipid Profile", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/684/684908.png", oldPrice: 1099, price: 599, discount: "45% Off", tests: ["Total Cholesterol", "HDL", "LDL", "Triglycerides"], reportTime: "8 hours", description: "Risk assessment for cardiovascular disease.", }, ]; const fullBodyCheckups = [ { id: "fb-basic", title: "Full Body Checkup - Essential", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2645/2645874.png", oldPrice: 5399, price: 1599, discount: "70% Off", tests: [ "CBC", "Blood Sugar (Fasting)", "Lipid Profile", "Liver Function Test", "Kidney Function Test", "TSH (Thyroid)", ], reportTime: "24 hours", description: "Core full-body essential package for routine screening.", }, { id: "fb-advanced", title: "Full Body Checkup - Advanced", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2645/2645874.png", oldPrice: 8499, price: 2699, discount: "68% Off", tests: [ "CBC", "Complete Metabolic Panel", "Lipid Profile", "Thyroid Profile", "Vitamin D", "HbA1c", ], reportTime: "24–36 hours", description: "Bigger panel covering metabolic and endocrine markers.", }, { id: "fb-ultra-male", title: "Ultra Full Body Checkup - Male", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/3048/3048122.png", oldPrice: 34999, price: 11999, discount: "66% Off", tests: [ "Complete blood panels", "Advanced cardiac markers", "Hormone profile", "Vitamin D & B12", "PSA", ], reportTime: "48 hours", description: "Extensive package for in-depth male health screening.", }, ]; // helper: unified list for mapping by click (so every card can open popup) const allItems = [ ...healthCheckups.map((i) => ({ ...i, type: "checkup" })), ...healthTests.map((i) => ({ ...i, type: "test" })), ...fullBodyCheckups.map((i) => ({ ...i, type: "fullbody" })), ]; // click handler: open popup with full details const openDetails = (item) => setSelected(item); const closeDetails = () => setSelected(null); return (

Pathology — Checkups & Tests

Popular Health Checkups

{healthCheckups.map((c) => (
openDetails(c)}>
{c.title}
₹{c.price} ₹{c.oldPrice}
))}

Popular Health Tests

{healthTests.map((c) => (
openDetails(c)}>
{c.title}
₹{c.price} ₹{c.oldPrice}
))}

Full Body Checkups

{fullBodyCheckups.map((c) => (
openDetails(c)}>
{c.title}
₹{c.price} ₹{c.oldPrice} {c.discount}
))}
{/* Popup detail modal (identical layout for any item) */} {selected && (
e.stopPropagation()}>
{selected.title}
{selected.discount}
₹{selected.oldPrice} ₹{selected.price}

{selected.description}

Tests included
    {selected.tests && selected.tests.map((t, i) =>
  • {t}
    • )}
Reports: {selected.reportTime} {selected.tests ? selected.tests.length : "—"} tests
)}
); }; export default PathologyPage;
